examples: The addax lives in the Sahara Desert of northern Africa.
Addax operates the huge Taq Taq field near Erbil in a joint venture.
Addax declined to comment this weekend on reports about Sinopec's offer.
Like Addax, Oryx will be focused on exploring for oil in west Africa and Iraqi Kurdistan.
Like Addax was before it, Oryx is named after a noble African relative of the antelope with grand horns.
